body.prompt: Will Apple release a foldable iPhone before January 1, 2028?
body.resolutionCriteria: Resolve true if Apple publicly sells an iPhone model with a foldable display before 2028-01-01.

body.prompt: When will Apple release its first foldable iPhone?
body.resolutionCriteria: Return the most likely public release date for the first Apple iPhone model with a foldable display.

body.prompt: How many orbital launches will SpaceX conduct in calendar year 2027?
body.resolutionCriteria: Return the expected number of SpaceX orbital launches from 2027-01-01 through 2027-12-31 UTC.

body.prompt: Which company will ship the first widely available consumer AR glasses with all-day usability?
body.resolutionCriteria: Choose the company most likely to be first to sell consumer AR glasses with transparent display, mobile compute, and practical all-day wearability.

body.prompt: What are the probabilities that SpaceX completes at least each launch threshold in calendar year 2027?
body.resolutionCriteria: Resolve each threshold by counting SpaceX orbital launches in calendar year 2027 UTC.

body.prompt: Conditional on Starship reaching operational weekly launch cadence by December 31, 2026, will SpaceX complete at least 160 orbital launches in calendar year 2027?
body.condition: Starship reaches operational weekly launch cadence by December 31, 2026
body.conditionResolutionCriteria: Resolve true if Starship/Super Heavy averages at least one orbital launch per week during December 2026.
body.resolutionCriteria: Resolve true if SpaceX completes at least 160 orbital launches between 2027-01-01 and 2027-12-31 UTC.

body.prompt: What design choices make local AI research agents reliable enough for benchmark-driven workflow iteration?
body.background: Focus on durability, traces, evidence capture, scoring, and human review loops.
